chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1251 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) For hearing of CMA No.5159/2023 (U/A) 17.08.2023 Mr. Touqeer Ahmed Domki, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press the instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
